notes: Frontend and content stay active because premium UI and question quality are the main product wedge.
Manager, Nemoclaw, Gemini, and Antigravity stay active to keep coordination, batch growth, audit, and experiments moving.
Beacon wakes for bounded email-growth work instead of competing with Mercury's social posting lane.
Nova stays live only when the mobile rollout path has a real bounded deliverable instead of open-ended future planning.
Reserve lanes wake when they have a real bounded task instead of staying asleep for a cosmetic rotation.
